summary: Focana 1.7.0 makes returning to work more deliberate, with smarter re-entry after interruptions, a clearer app-managed trial and upgrade path, and a more useful pause flow that can wrap, resume, or save the active session.
improvements: Added an auto re-entry rule so interrupted work can come back in the right surface without asking you to rebuild context from scratch.
Added an app-managed trial and upgrade flow that makes activation, upgrade prompts, and packaged release behavior clearer.
Improved resident app flows so relaunching, waking, quitting, and returning from compact or floating mode preserve focus more intentionally.
Pause now opens a dismissible Session Wrap, letting you keep working, mark the task complete, take a break, start something new, or save the paused session for later.
fixes: Fixed direct completion and wake re-entry paths so saved work and next-step prompts stay aligned after interruptions.
Fixed compact quit behavior and startup window selection edge cases that could leave Focana in the wrong surface.
Improved shortcut and check-in focus handling so temporary global actions return attention to the right place.
Added release safeguards for analytics configuration and expanded packaged-flow coverage around floating, compact, and pause session states.
